import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, math, textwrap, os, sys, pandas as pd

# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

# Build text fields
def norm(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.replace("ـ","")
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace("إ","ا").replace("أ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ى","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ً","").replace("ٌ","").replace("ٍ","").replace("َ","").replace("ُ","").replace("ِ","").replace("ّ","").replace("ْ","")
    s = re.sub(r"\s+"," ", s).strip()
    return s

# Prepare hadith texts (matn fields)
hadith_texts = []
for rec in hadith:
    txt = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ""
    if txt:
        hadith_texts.append((txt, norm(txt), rec))

len(hadith_texts)

snippet_full = "لَوْ كُنتُ أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ لَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ، وَلَكِنَّهُ يُريدُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَ الناسَ بِالنُبُوَّةِ، فَلَمْ أُحِبْ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ"
snippet_norm = norm(snippet_full)
snippet_norm

for rec in quran:
